title: Vanillа Minеcraft 1.21.11
body:
**Accurate weapon collision detection** - No more pixel hunting with your cursor, you can now just swing your weapon and hit whatever is in the way. Enjoy fighting in third person view.

**Dual wield any one handed weapons!** Use the attack hotkey to alternately attack with main-hand and off-hand.

**Reworked Sweeping Edge Weapon** - Swing hitting multiple enemies deal reduced damage. To deal full weapon damage against all targets, you need to have Sweeping Edge enchantment

**Hold** to attack the attack hotkey to spam attacks on cooldown!

![swingu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38efa008bc297aa49572761bed1eff2399a1b2dc.gif)
